description: master + exactly 1 pending stream — Case B: auto-checkout, emit message, continue.
owning_behavior: STEP 0.0 Case B (R-MW-5, D29) — master + 1 pending → auto-checkout
expected_result: PASS — Case B fires; branch checked out; emit message; orchestrator advances to STEP 0.1
load_bearing_assertion: HEAD = master. _streams/my-analytics/brief.md status=pending, branch=feature/my-analytics. Registered set = {feature/my-analytics}. Exactly 1 pending → Case B → git checkout feature/my-analytics → emit 'Auto-checked out branch `feature/my-analytics` for workstream `my-analytics`.' → continue.
separates_from_defect_by: defect-case-b-no-auto-checkout proceeds on master without checking out the pending stream branch (master state unresolved). Golden: checkout message present + branch switched.
